entries.title: API SPEC

The documented base URL /api/v1 is NOT implemented in the current backend (no /api/v1 routes) and the mock-shaped types do not match the real API. Stale early contract; do not use as source of truth without rewrite.

entries.title: COMMENT DECISION DRYRUN REPORT

entries.title: COMMENT INTELLIGENCE PIPELINE
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24C. Self-labelled DESIGN (rev 3) — forward-looking knowledge-first autonomous-agent comment pipeline (P1-P4). Underlying ai/comment + workspace_knowledge stacks exist and parts have shipped via the comment-intelligence track, but the doc remains design guidance, so kept as draft rather than active.

entries.title: COMPONENT HOTSPOTS
verified_against: current ls internal/ai = 25 .go files, agent_*=0, comment_*=5 (doc claims 43 files, agent_*=11, comment_*=12)
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D. Explicitly-dated 2026-06-14 inventory snapshot now OUTDATED: internal/ai dropped 43->25 .go files, the agent_* cluster (11) moved to internal/drivers/copilot, comment_* 12->5, so its 'internal/ai is the first refactor target' recommendation has partially already been executed. Companion rules doc component-structure-rules stays active; this snapshot needs regeneration.

entries.title: COMPONENT STRUCTURE RULES
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24B. Self-declared ACTIVE_BINDING; enforced warn-only by scripts/check_component_structure.py with companion COMPONENT_HOTSPOTS.md. Referenced intelligence-layer example internal/ai/comment exists.

entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24C. PR-1 (migration 0022 + typed coordination store) and PR-2 (directPostIntake service + runDirectPostIntakeScheduler process manager) landed with tests. PR-3 hardening (worker poller, transactional outbox) is future.

entries.title: TELEGRAM BOT RUNTIME
verified_against: bounded-context packages exist (store/telegram, telegram/control, server/telegram, telegram/client, telegram/render, server/integrations)
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24F. Bounded-context Telegram runtime is implemented: store -> control -> {integrations, server/telegram}; webhook runtime present; the legacy long-poll bot.go is deleted as the doc states. Active and implementation-backed.

entries.title: TELEGRAM CHANNEL DESTINATIONS
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24G. Channel-first destinations backend shipped: telegram_destinations (migration 0015), store CRUD, and control.NotifyEvent resolve/filter/deliver path all exist with tests. Active/implementation-backed; builds on active telegram-bot-runtime.

entries.title: TELEGRAM EVENT WIRING
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24F. lead_created + comment/inbox/post outcomes are wired to per-org Telegram channels: leadingest.IngestPost exposes the OnLeadCreated hook, consumed by the worker and server crawl path; outcome finalize emits via control. (Doc cites server/agent/crawl.go; the hook wiring lives in server/agent/crawl_ingest.go — minor path drift.) Active and implementation-backed.

entries.title: TELEGRAM INTEGRATION UI
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24G. PR-1 BACKEND (telegram_settings/bind_codes/bindings/alert_prefs/audit via migration 0013, tenant-scoped /api/settings/integrations/telegram handlers, default-safe flags) is shipped. The PR-2 Next.js UI is future. Active/implementation-backed for the backend contract.

entries.title: TELEGRAM PER ORG BOT
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24G. Per-org encrypted bot credentials backend shipped: telegram_bot_credentials (migration 0016, doc said 0015 - actual is 0016), AES-GCM encrypt, GetDecryptedBotToken internal-only, per-org resolveBot for connect/delivery. Active/implementation-backed.

entries.title: TEMPLATE TELEGRAM COPILOT PLAN
verified_against: core verified-state-centric invariants now codified in active runtime-topology + v2-outbound-refactor-design + append-only-ledger-migration
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24G. Broad v2.5 umbrella architecture plan (Outbound Invariant -> Engagement Ledger -> Templates -> Telegram -> Copilot). Its core verified-state-centric / append-only invariants have since been decomposed into and shipped via the now-authoritative active specs (runtime-topology, v2-outbound-refactor-design, append-only-ledger-migration); the Templates/Copilot portions remain forward-looking. Kept draft as ancestor architecture reference, not active, to avoid duplicating the authoritative specs.

entries.title: V2 OUTBOUND REFACTOR DESIGN
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D. PR1 (action_policies table + policy-driven dedup, transition ledger rows, 7 global functions deleted, tenant isolation) is reflected in internal/store/outbound. PR2 (drop legacy status column + split outbound.go) remains future. Active design guiding PR2.

entries.title: WORKSPACE KNOWLEDGE OS
verified_against: retrieval-soak-runbook proves a working retrieval substrate
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D. KnowledgeOS backend (org-scoped assets -> retrieval -> context assembly) is implemented under internal/workspace_knowledge. Later vector-DB port-swap (pgvector/Qdrant) and some L5-L7 layers are deferred per the doc, but the core foundation is real and backed by the soak harness.
